author: maxine--basel--gh-issues-299-and-301
content: Result: Implemented both fixes. #301: 3 verification sites now check both stdout+stderr for ssh-keygen 'Good' message (signing.rs verify_content, sync.rs commit signature audit x2). #299: SharedWriter::new() creates anonymous identity when no agent.json, auto-inits hub cache if branch exists, unsigned commits via -c commit.gpgsign=false. All 186 tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean.
